text.message: I would if I was last
for i am the sheep king
I would place second one on 8-3-10 if I were you
for i am the sheep king
i'm not known for my patience
look at the evil brick king
what does he know of the glory of sheep
I guess that makes me the wheat king?
blue is on 6 as well with army
well thou did not helpest the sheepking
this will please the great sheep in the sky
the land of wheat is in a recession
i shall show all of you the power of sheep
now the 5 is even more powerful
i wish you wouldn't have gotten so many robbers lol
im starting to question the sheep strategy
